user.title: Connect to EmotionKit
user.description: The integration connects automatically to https://emotionkit.de. Enter a device name.

claim.title: Enter claim code
claim.description:
Enter this code in the EmotionKit web interface to register the device:

**{claim_code}**

Open https://emotionkit.de and enter the code there. Then click submit once you have entered the code.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the EmotionKit server.
error.claim_timeout: Timeout — the code was not entered in time. Please try again.
error.claim_failed: Registration failed. The code may have expired.
